languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pensively tightens a bolt on his beard and nods.{/n} "Amazing sincerity, Nuncius. It is gratifying to see that you have not lost your sense of tact over the years."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн задумчиво подкручивает болт на бороде и кивает.{/n} "Поразительная искренность, Нунцуис. Отрадно видеть, что за годы ты не растерял чувства такта".
{n}Eogunn pensively tightens a bolt on his beard and nods.{/n} "Amazing sincerity, Nuncius. It is gratifying to see that you have not lost your sense of tact over the years."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн задумчиво подкручивает болт на бороде и кивает.{/n} "Поразительная искренность, Нунцуис. Отрадно видеть, что за годы ты не растерял чувства такта".

{n}Eo-gann pensively tightens a bolt on his beard and nods.{/n} "Amazing sincerity, Nuncius. It is gratifying to see that you have not lost your sense of tact over the years."
{n}Eo-gann pensively tightens a bolt on his beard and nods.{/n} "Amazing sincerity, Nuncius. It is gratifying to see that you have not lost your sense of tact over the years."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは顎の髭のボルトを考えながら締め、頷く。{/n}「本当に誠実な心、ヌンシウス。歳月を経てもtactを忘れないとは、嬉しいことです。」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pensively tightens a bolt on his beard and nods.{/n} "Amazing sincerity, Nuncius. It is gratifying to see that you have not lost your sense of tact over the years."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn spielt gedankenverloren mit einem Bolzen an seinem Bart und nickt.{/n} "Ich liebe Eure Ehrlichkeit, Nuncius. Es ist ausgesprochen erfreulich, dass Ihr Euer Taktgefühl in all den Jahren nicht verloren habt."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pensively tightens a bolt on his beard and nods.{/n} "Amazing sincerity, Nuncius. It is gratifying to see that you have not lost your sense of tact over the years."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eo-gann spielt gedankenverloren mit einem Bolzen an seinem Bart und nickt.{/n} "Ich liebe Eure Ehrlichkeit, Nuncius. Es ist ausgesprochen erfreulich, dass Ihr Euer Taktgefühl in all den Jahren nicht verloren habt."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn se aprieta pensativamente una tuerca de la barba y asiente con la cabeza.{/n} «Una sinceridad asombrosa, Nuncius. Me satisface comprobar que no has perdido tacto con el paso de los años».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pensively tightens a bolt on his beard and nods.{/n} "Amazing sincerity, Nuncius. It is gratifying to see that you have not lost your sense of tact over the years."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eo-gann se aprieta pensativamente una tuerca de la barba y asiente con la cabeza.{/n} «Una sinceridad asombrosa, Nuncius. Me satisface comprobar que no has perdido tacto con el paso de los años».

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, sakalındaki bir cıvatayı düşünceli bir şekilde sıkıp başını sallıyor.{/n} "Şaşırtıcı bir samimiyet Nuncius. Yıllar içinde nezaket duygunu kaybetmediğini görmek memnuniyet verici."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pensively tightens a bolt on his beard and nods.{/n} "Amazing sincerity, Nuncius. It is gratifying to see that you have not lost your sense of tact over the years."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eo-gann, sakalındaki bir cıvatayı düşünceli bir şekilde sıkıp başını sallıyor.{/n} "Şaşırtıcı bir samimiyet Nuncius. Yıllar içinde nezaket duygunu kaybetmediğini görmek memnuniyet verici."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn resserre pensivement un boulon dans sa barbe puis hoche la tête.{/n} « Quelle sincérité remarquable, Nuncius. Je suis ravi que les années ne t'aient pas privé de ton sens du tact. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pensively tightens a bolt on his beard and nods.{/n} "Amazing sincerity, Nuncius. It is gratifying to see that you have not lost your sense of tact over the years."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eo-gann resserre pensivement un boulon dans sa barbe puis hoche la tête.{/n} « Quelle sincérité remarquable, Nuncius. Je suis ravi que les années ne t'aient pas privé de ton sens du tact. »

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡若有所思地拧紧胡须上的一颗螺栓，点了点头。{/n}“这份诚意真是难得，努恩修斯。我很欣慰，这些年来你依然保有这份得体。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn pensively tightens a bolt on his beard and nods.{/n} "Amazing sincerity, Nuncius. It is gratifying to see that you have not lost your sense of tact over the years."
